predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company has the background status of being a small company.

predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has legal personality as a background legal status that may be directly stated in a case.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary_company
predicates.description: The company has the background status of being a subsidiary company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company has the background status of being a parent company.

predicates.name: last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's last closed financial year.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee-number criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the criteria relevant to micro-company classification in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company is legally classified as a micro-company for the relevant financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The company's annual net turnover excluding value added tax in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The company's balance sheet total in the financial year.
